problems.matrix_str: from sympy import Matrix, symbols, diag, eye; A = Matrix([[5, 2], [2, 2]]); lambda_ = symbols('lambda'); char_poly = A.charpoly(lambda_); eigenvals = A.eigenvals(); is_symmetric = A == A.T; Q, D = A.diagonalize(); orthogonal_check = Q.T * Q == eye(2); result = {'eigenvalues': list(eigenvals.keys()), 'is_symmetric': is_symmetric, 'orthogonal_check': orthogonal_check}

from sympy import Matrix, symbols, solve
A = Matrix([[4, 3], [3, -4]])
lambda_ = symbols('lambda')
char_eq = A.charpoly(lambda_).as_expr()
eigenvalues = solve(char_eq, lambda_)
result = {'eigenvalues': eigenvalues}

from sympy import Matrix; A = Matrix([[-1, 2, 0, 0], [2, -4, 0, 0], [0, 0, 7, 2], [0, 0, 2, 4]]); is_symmetric = A == A.T; eigenvalues = A.eigenvals(); result = {'is_symmetric': is_symmetric, 'eigenvalues': eigenvalues}
from sympy import Matrix, symbols; A = Matrix([[6, 0, 0], [0, 1, 6], [0, 6, 6]]); eigenvalues = A.eigenvals(); eigenvectors = A.eigenvects(); result = {'eigenvalues': list(eigenvalues.keys())}

from sympy import Matrix

A = Matrix([[-3, 0, 2, 0], [0, -1, 0, 2], [2, 0, 0, 0], [0, 2, 0, -4]])
eigenvalues = A.eigenvals(multiple=True)
is_symmetric = A == A.T

result = {'is_symmetric': is_symmetric, 'eigenvalues': eigenvalues}
